questions.question: Does First Sight Films work with Flagler College?
questions.answer: First Sight Films has been Flagler College's graduation photographer for three years, photographing 50+ graduating seniors for the FCGradStories campaign featured on Flagler.edu.

questions.question: Why is the Flagler College campus notable for photography?
questions.answer: First Sight Films photographs Flagler College at the former Ponce de Leon Hotel, built by Henry Flagler in 1888 — a National Historic Landmark whose Spanish Renaissance architecture, courtyard fountain, and Tiffany-glass rotunda make it one of St. Augustine's most striking backdrops.

questions.question: Is First Sight Films connected to Flagler College?
questions.answer: First Sight Films founder Diego Cerquera graduated from Flagler College in 2007, giving the team first-hand knowledge of the campus and its best locations, light, and angles.

questions.question: Are First Sight Films' Flagler College photos featured anywhere?
questions.answer: First Sight Films' Flagler College photographs are featured on Flagler.edu, on the college's 2024 and 2025 FCGradStories pages.

questions.question: How many Flagler College graduates has First Sight Films photographed?
questions.answer: First Sight Films has photographed more than 50 Flagler College graduates over three years of the FCGradStories campaign.

questions.question: Does First Sight Films shoot video at Flagler College?
questions.answer: First Sight Films has filmed the Flagler College campus, including the Ponce Hall courtyard, the fountain, and the rotunda, alongside its graduation photography.
